english_first.policy: Deterministic per-block pre-board builds a wider source-language ranking board; DeepSeek scores that board; only then the final Russian writing board is cut. Source-language fact cards are service data only, and visible Russian is written directly from facts/evidence.

english_card_memory.policy: Reuse English fact/reader cards by content hash only; changed facts, date, venue, or evidence force a fresh card.

examples.title: Amended timetables warning as Piccadilly rail disruption continues into the weekend
Sounds of the City: Wet Leg
An Evening With Simon Shaw & Alfredo Arribas
Stand-up workshop (weekly monday sessions)

translation_memory.policy: Reuse Russian draft_line when compact fact signature matches; content-hash entries allow safe reuse across repeated event URLs/fingerprints.

repair_policy: hard_defects_only; soft short/style issues are left for writer recovery and whole-digest final editor

batching_strategy.short_card_target_batch: 6-8 items when token budget allows; heavy items split automatically.

concurrency_policy.policy: Do not raise concurrency until token reservation p95 tightening is stable with truncated_responses=0.

batch_api_policy.reason: Batch API is suited to overnight non-urgent work; the 08:00 digest requires online completion.

repair_rejections.title: Спектакль "Скамейка"
quality_errors: sold-out event must not be published.
repair_rejections.draft_line_excerpt: • 29 ноября 2026 года в Logan Hall в Лондоне пройдет спектакль «Скамейка» с Алексеем Паниным и Ольгой Силиной, начало в 19:00, двери открываются в 18:00. Билеты от £30.

repair_rejections.title: Bottomless PizzaLuxe Manchester
quality_errors: event date in draft_line conflicts with structured event date.
repair_rejections.draft_line_excerpt: • Bottomless PizzaLuxe в Manchester Arndale предлагает неограниченные пиццы и напитки с 5 июля 2026 года, билеты £38.44.

repair_rejections.title: The Manchester United players expected back for Michael Carrick's first day of pre-season training
quality_errors: draft_line for long-format category needs ≥2 sentences (got 1).
draft_line contains number(s) not present in candidate evidence: 2026, 9.
repair_rejections.draft_line_excerpt: • Игроки Манчестер Юнайтед вернутся к предсезонной подготовке на базе Каррингтон в четверг, 9 июля 2026 года, под руководством нового главного тренера Майкла Каррика, перед товарищеским матчем против Уэксема 18 июля.
